hooks.command: bun -e "const d=await Bun.stdin.json();const cmd=d.tool_input?.command??'';if(!/\bgit\s+commit\b/.test(cmd))process.exit(0);const p=Bun.spawn(['bun','run','check'],{stdout:'inherit',stderr:'inherit'});await p.exited;if(p.exitCode!==0){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Pre-commit check failed (lint/format/typecheck). Fix issues before committing.'}))}"
